8.description: deduplicate parcels (one row per parcel) preserving area and municipality/county names

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, lagretberegnetareal, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '5001' AND lagretberegnetareal > 5000;

2.description: inspect distinct quick-clay risk class values

3.description: select quick-clay polygons with the high-risk class (value to be filled after step 2)

4.description: get parcels in Trondheim with area > 5000 m2 including geometry and municipality info

5.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced quick-clay high-risk polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per parcel preserving area, geometry, and municipality

7.description: attach county by spatially joining parcels with fylker polygons
